prompt: Clear Safari's browsing history for 'the last hour' (History > Clear History... > choose 'the last hour' > Clear History; or cerebellum 'safari clear_history_range hour ~/Desktop/kinbench/106-clear-history-confirm.txt' which does both the UI flow and the confirm file). Then write 'history cleared: last hour' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/106-clear-history-confirm.txt (the History.db is TCC-protected; we trust the confirm file).
